actionCalls.description: compare the existing answers vs. new answers so that duplicates are not created and removed records can be deleted
actionCalls.name: Compare_Existing_vs_New
actionCalls.label: Compare Existing vs. New

assignments.description: - assign the number of answers that were added from the datatable - no answers existed previously so the removed/unchanged counts remain at 0 and are not required for assignment
assignments.name: Assign_New_Answer_Count
assignments.label: Assign New Answer Count

assignments.description: assign the RFP Pursuit Answer Values
assignments.name: assign_New_Answer_Values
assignments.label: assign New Answer Values

assignments.description: assign the individual RFP Question Banks to a collection variable for preselection in datatable
assignments.name: assign_Question_Collection
assignments.label: assign Question Collection

assignments.description: assign the question ids from the existing answers to a collection variable so that they appear pre-selected in the datatable
assignments.name: assign_Question_Variable
assignments.label: assign Question Variable

assignments.description: assign the Answer record variable to a collection
assignments.name: assign_Unique_Answer_Collection
assignments.label: assign Unique Answer Collection

assignments.description: assign the Answer record variable to a collection
assignments.name: assign_Unique_Answer_Collection_0
assignments.label: assign Unique Answer Collection

assignments.description: assign the number of answers that were removed, added or left unchanged
assignments.name: Assign_Unique_Answer_Count
assignments.label: Assign Unique Answer Count

assignments.description: assign the RFP Pursuit Answer Values
assignments.name: assign_Unique_New_Answer_Values
assignments.label: assign Unique New Answer Values

value.stringValue: Sales Org,Project Details,Opportunity Selection,DSR Selection,File Upload,Select Answers,Enter Comments,Summary,Complete

decisions.description: confirm that all category questions have been answered appropriately
decisions.name: Answer_Validation
decisions.label: Answer Validation

decisions.description: check to see if there where any RFP Pursuit Answers already associated to the Project
decisions.name: Answers_Already_Existed
decisions.label: Answers Already Existed

decisions.description: checks to see if any answers were deselections in the answers table
decisions.name: Answers_Deselected
decisions.label: Answers Deselected?

decisions.description: check if the flow errored due to character length
decisions.name: Check_for_Character_Length_Error
decisions.label: Check for Character Length Error

decisions.description: check to make sure that a comment has been added for each answer
decisions.name: Check_for_Comments
decisions.label: Check for Comments

decisions.description: check where the flow was initiated from to determine the screens shows
decisions.name: Check_Origin
decisions.label: Check Origin

decisions.description: .Org has requirement to enter comments, so need to check if it's a .Org Project in order to show that comment requirement screen
decisions.name: Check_Sales_Org
decisions.label: Check Sales Org

decisions.description: Check to see if the project is for Public Sector
decisions.name: Is_this_Public_Sector
decisions.label: Is this Public Sector

decisions.description: checks to see if any new answers were selected in the answers table (for new record creation)
decisions.name: New_Answers_Selected
decisions.label: New Answers Selected?

Flow.interviewLabel: guided flow to walk the user through answering bid / no-bid questions for Avnio Projects {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GPS NGO RFP Go / No Go Questions

loops.description: loop over the answers that previously existed
loops.name: ExistingAnswers
loops.label: ExistingAnswers

loops.description: loop over the new answers that were selected in the answers table
loops.name: New_Answers
loops.label: New Answers

loops.description: loop over the unique new answers that were selected in the answers table
loops.name: Unique_New_Answers
loops.label: Unique New Answers

recordCreates.description: bulk create the Questions that were selected from the table as Answers
recordCreates.name: create_RFP_Pursuit_Answers
recordCreates.label: create RFP Pursuit Answers

recordDeletes.description: deletes the deselected answers from a project record
recordDeletes.name: Delete_Deselected_Answers
recordDeletes.label: Delete Deselected Answers

recordLookups.description: get any answers without comments for Salesforce.org comment requirement
recordLookups.name: get_Answers_w_o_Comments
recordLookups.label: get AE Answers w/o Comments

recordLookups.description: get the project record from which the flow was launched
recordLookups.name: get_Cur_Project
recordLookups.label: get Cur Project

recordLookups.description: get any answers without comments for Salesforce.org comment requirement
recordLookups.name: get_SE_Answers_w_o_Comments
recordLookups.label: get SE Answers w/o Comments

recordLookups.description: get the updated project for new bid / no-bid score display
recordLookups.name: get_Updated_Project
recordLookups.label: get Updated Project

recordLookups.description: get the existing RFP Pursuit Answers related to the Project
recordLookups.name: getExistingAnswers
recordLookups.label: getExistingAnswers

screens.description: allows for comments to be entered for selected Answers
screens.name: Comment_Screen
screens.label: Comment Screen

fields.name: dtxtCommentInstructions
fields.fieldText:
Enter a comment for each answer in the table below.

*Each comment must be less than 255 characters.

﻿*Responses cannot be Saved until there is a comment entered for each answer

*After entering comments, click 'Save' to advance to the next screen.

fields.name: dtCommentError
fields.fieldText: Each answer must have a comment.

screens.description: allows for comments to be entered for selected Answers
screens.name: Comment_Screen_0
screens.label: Comment Screen

fields.name: dtxtCommentInstructions_0
fields.fieldText:
Enter a comment for each answer in the table below.

*Each comment must be less than 255 characters.

﻿*Responses cannot be Saved until there is a comment entered for each answer

*After entering comments, click 'Save' to advance to the next screen.

fields.name: dtCommentError_0
fields.fieldText: Each answer must have a comment.

fields.name: dtxtFaultMsg
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong with this flow.


Your admin has received an email about this error.

fields.name: dtxtCommentInstructions_0_0
fields.fieldText: Select your role:

screens.description: displays if the user has not completed all of the questions
screens.name: Incomplete_Screen
screens.label: Incomplete Screen

fields.name: dtxtIncompleteCategories
fields.fieldText:
Incomplete Answers

The categories below have not been answered.

Please click Previous to update the answers.


{!LOEInvocableError}

screens.description: allows for comments to be entered for selected Answers
screens.name: Missing_Comment_Screen
screens.label: Missing Comment Screen

fields.name: dtxtCommentInstructions_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Enter a comment for each answer in the table below.

*Each comment must be less than 255 characters.

﻿*Responses cannot be Saved until there is a comment entered for each answer

*After entering comments, click 'Save' to advance to the next screen.

fields.name: dtCommentError_0_0
fields.fieldText: Each answer must have a comment.

fields.name: dtxtStringLengthFaultMsg
fields.fieldText:
Each comment must be less than 255 characters.


Please click 'Re-Enter Comments' to return to the comment entry screen.

screens.description: displays the number of removed, added and unchanged answers
screens.name: Summary_Screen
screens.label: Summary Screen

fields.name: dtxt_ChangeSummary
fields.fieldText:
Answer Summary


New Score: {!get_Updated_Project.GNG_Score__c}

Prior Score: {!get_Cur_Project.GNG_Score__c}


Added: {!n_NewAnswerCount}

Removed: {!n_DeselectedAnswerCount}

Unchanged: {!n_UnchangedAnswerCount}

fields.name: dotOrg_Special_Messaging_Over70
fields.fieldText:
Answer Summary


Thank you for submitting this RFP!


You've successfully created Project {!get_Updated_Project.Name}



Your current Go / No Go Score is {!get_Updated_Project.GNG_Score__c}


The next step is for the assigned SE to review and comment on the Go / No Go Scorecard. Follow directions in this document to complete this step.


The last step is for your manager to review the final Go / No Go Scorecard and provide their appr﻿oval.


You will receive a response from the RFP Team within one business day determining next steps.


In the meantime, visit Salesforce.org RFP Central Spot and #sfdo-rfp-support Slack channel where you can learn more about our team and gain access to RFP Response tools and templates.

fields.name: dotOrg_Special_Messaging_70orBelow
fields.fieldText:
Answer Summary


Thank you for submitting this RFP!


﻿You've successfully created Project {!get_Updated_Project.Name}



Your current Go / No Go Score is {!get_Updated_Project.GNG_Score__c}


Note: This is below the threshold and therefore requires additional approvals, please carefully read the directions below.


The next step is for the assigned SE to review and comment on the Go / No Go Scorecard. Follow directions in this document to complete this step.


The last step is for your manager, your sales AVP and SE manager to review the final Go / No Go Scorecard and provide their approval.


You will receive a response from the RFP Team within one business day determining next steps.


In the meantime, visit Salesforce.org RFP Central Spot and #sfdo-rfp-support Slack channel where you can learn more about our team and gain access to RFP Response tools and templates.

fields.name: dotOrg_Special_Messaging_Resubmit_70orBelow
fields.fieldText:
Answer Summary


Your updated Go / No Go Score is {!get_Updated_Project.GNG_Score__c}

Prior Score: {!get_Cur_Project.GNG_Score__c}


The next step is for the assigned SE to review and comment on the Go / No Go Scorecard. Follow directions in this document to complete this step.


The last step is for your manager, your sales AVP and SE manager to review the final Go / No Go Scorecard and provide their approval.

fields.name: dtxtTitle
fields.fieldText: Go/No-Go Scorecard

fields.name: dtxtTableInstructions
fields.fieldText:
Select the appropriate answer(s) for each category in the table below.

Note: Previously selected answers will already be selected.

variables.description: collection variable to store the RFP_Pursuit_Answer__c records that have a comment for mass update
variables.name: cvarAnswerComments

variables.description: collection variable to store all of the Questions that have been answered on the project
variables.name: cvarExistingRFPQuestions

variables.description: collection variable to store the new rfp pursuit answers to be created in bulk
variables.name: cvarNewRFPAnswers

variables.description: the number of new answers selected for display in screen message
variables.name: n_NewAnswerCount

variables.description: represents the number of existing answers that we not deselected
variables.name: n_UnchangedAnswerCount

variables.description: input variable to determine where the flow originated
variables.name: Origin

variables.description: stores the recordID of the Project
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: stores RFP Pursuit Question Bank record for assignment to collection
variables.name: varRFPQuestionBank
